## Problem

Describe the missing behavior or documentation gap.

## Expected Outcome

Describe the smallest acceptable completed state.

## Boundaries

- Keep the change narrow
- Update tests or docs if command behavior changes
- Do not expand scope into unrelated governance surfaces
